query_normalized: code2lora: hypernetwork-generated adapters for code language models under software evolution computer science
rationale: The paper investigates low‑rank adapters (a form of PEFT/LoRA) for large language models, which matches the core mechanism (adapter‑based fine‑tuning) of the user's “hypernetwork‑generated adapters” question, satisfying inclusion criterion (a) same‑mechanism evidence (and also serves as a foundational reference for adapter methods).
